zh.lifeSummary: 當Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany於1362年12月9日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏法爾可藍德時，他的父親Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany22歲，母親Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith28歲。他於1391年2月17日與Isabella De Lennox在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾音姆連結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年5月25日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany于1362年12月9日出生在英国苏格兰費伏法爾可藍德时，他的父亲Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany22岁，母亲Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith28岁。他于1391年2月17日与Isabella De Lennox在苏格兰登巴頓史爾音姆連结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年5月25日在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Murdoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Muireadhach, meaning ‘lord’, but said to be a derivative of muir ‘sea’.

en.lifeSummary: When Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany was born on 9 December 1362, in Falkland, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, was 28. He married Isabella De Lennox on 17 February 1391, in Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 May 1425, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany est né le 9 décembre 1362, à Falkland, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isabella De Lennox le 17 février 1391, à Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1425, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany am 9. Dezember 1362 in Falkland, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith 28. Er hat am 17. Februar 1391 in Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland Isabella De Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1425 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany è nato il il 9 dicembre 1362 nel Falkland, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isabella De Lennox il 17 febbraio 1391, nel Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 maggio 1425, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albanyが1362年12月9日にイギリススコットランドフィフファルクランドで生まれた時，父Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albanyは22歳，母Margaret Graham Countess of Menteithは28歳であった。1391年2月17日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアインチムリンでIsabella De Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年5月25日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで62歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany(이)가 1362년 12월 9일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 파클랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1391년 2월 17일 스컷랜드 던바토실르 인ch머린에서 Isabella De Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 5월 25일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.9 December 1362–24 May 1425: 9 de dezembro de 1362–25 de maio de 1425
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany nasceu em 9 de dezembro de 1362, em Falkland, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella De Lennox em 17 de fevereiro de 1391, em Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1425, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany родился 9 декабря 1362 г. в местности фалкланд, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella De Lennox 17 февраля 1391 г. в местности инчмуррин, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 мая 1425 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1393 to 1407: mai le 1393 e o'o I le 1407

es.9 December 1362–24 May 1425: 9 de diciembre de 1362–25 de mayo de 1425
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Murdoch Stewart 2nd Duke of Albany nació el 9 de diciembre de 1362, en Falkland, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Isabella De Lennox el 17 de febrero de 1391, en Inchmurrin, Dunbartonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1425, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
